rag_rules: AGREE annex blocks must be placed inside `annex agree {** ... **};` syntax and follow AADL component type or implementation scope rules.
generic_rules: Preserve AADL architecture scope when inserting annex content; ensure owner and visibility rules are respected.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE annex blocks use `annex agree {** ... **};` syntax and must be valid within component type or implementation contexts.
anti_patterns: Do not insert AGREE annex content into invalid AADL scopes or outside of component type/implementation boundaries.
